TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Jacob_Zuma, title = Jacob_Zuma, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jacob_Zuma} }

S.FORM: Jacob Zuma I 1942 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 12 a romi'ad masofoc ci Jacob Zuma, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no South africa anini i ci Jacob Zuma, patirengan a romi'ad i 2009 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 9 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: *a ¶o~ub~b~v *o~u~uma i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *a ¶o~ub~b~v *o~u~uma, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u so~uo~u~utńß afri ¶a anini i ¶i *a ¶o~ub~b~v *o~u~uma, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Jacob Zuma I 1942 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 12 a romi'ad masofoc ci Jacob Zuma, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no South africa anini i ci Jacob Zuma, patirengan a romi'ad i 2009 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 9 a romi'ad.
